case_title: S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. VS. MARIANO CECCATO, JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,204.53 FILED BY S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CECCATO, JR., MARIANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CECCATO, JR., MARIANO $2,374.97 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,374.97, PARTIES ENTERED INTO A STIPULATED JUDGMENT & DEFENDANT EXECUTED A PROMISSORY NOTE IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,374.97. DEFENDANT TO MAKE MONTHLY INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF $400.00 UNTIL PAID IN FULL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-13-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CECCATO, JR., MARIANO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CECCATO, JR., MARIANO
